comments: Approved. The contract scope is bounded to Phase 1 analysis and cleanup activities: removing temporary non-project files such as .DS_Store, creating a Hermes/TechWriter skill for Docs SubAgent capability uplift, analyzing Archon documentation both locally at /Users/mlabs/Programs/Archon_Reference/docs and remotely at https://archon.diy/book/what-is-archon/, and producing tasks/v0.8-archon-docs-analysis.md. The scope explicitly states that the phase stops at analysis to enforce progressive review. The out_of_scope section correctly forbids rewriting actual team-agents-cowork documentation files during this phase, modifications to src/mcp-server/ logic, and changes to active workflow/dispatch.json or iteration-state.json state semantics outside patch progression. Stop conditions reinforce that documentation/EN or ZH modifications, runtime execution code changes, and execution without an approved contract must not occur. One minor observation: allowed_files lists only the analysis output while allowed_artifacts separately lists result artifacts, but required_outputs covers all expected deliverables, so this does not block approval.
